---
name: Improvement
about: Suggest an enhancement, alternative component, or additional documentation
title: "[IMPROVEMENT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
What improvement would you like to see? Be specific about what would help and why.

## Type of Improvement
- [ ] Alternative component with equivalent specs
- [ ] Additional documentation or guide section
- [ ] Clarification or restructuring of existing content
- [ ] Images or diagrams to improve understanding
- [ ] Real-world experience or installation variation
- [ ] Performance data or efficiency notes
- [ ] Troubleshooting guide addition
- [ ] Other: _____________

## Current State
Is there existing content related to this, or is this entirely new?

## Proposed Solution
What specifically do you suggest? Provide as much detail as helpful:
- Component details (part number, specs, cost, sourcing)?
- Documentation text or outline?
- Diagrams or visual explanations?
- Links to relevant resources?

## Benefits
Why would this improvement help users? Who would benefit most?

## Trade-offs
Are there any downsides or considerations?
- Cost impact?
- Complexity changes?
- Compatibility considerations?

## Additional Context
- Have you implemented this variation yourself?
- Do you have real-world performance data?
- References to external resources?

---

**We appreciate all suggestions that help make solarplan better! ⚓**
